intro.text: An endless symphony between the majesty of the past and the courage of the future. A harmonious blend where ancestral traditions are never rendered obsolete by the passage of time, but continue to thrive alongside boundless innovation. It is not merely a geographic expanse on a map, but a dimensional space where every visiting soul will always find their way back home to embrace the true meaning of peace.

philosophy.title: Memayu Hayuning Bawana
philosophy.subtitle: Beautifying the Beauty of the World
philosophy.desc: A bridge between a majestic past and an infinite future. Yogyakarta is not just a space, but a manifestation of harmony.

closing.heading: This story is just the beginning.
closing.lede: Choose the chapter you'd like to explore first.
